value.found_quote:
Set up monitoring
Learn how to use built-in metrics, custom metrics, and alerts to monitor your agents in Agent Platform.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "Set up monitoring" guide with the exact description matching the claim: using built-in metrics, custom metrics, and alerts to monitor agents in Agent Platform. The page also notes at the top that "This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'" indicating it is in Preview status.
